revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment:
[[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「
* {{Pathnav|宮城県の建築物|仙台市の建築物}} * {{Pathnav|仙台市|仙台市の区|泉区 (仙台市)}}
宮...」
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|宮城県の建築物|仙台市の建築物}} * {{Pathnav|仙台市|仙台市の区|泉区 (仙台市)}}
[[宮城県]][[仙台市]][[泉区 (仙台市)|泉区]]の[[建築物]]のカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:いすみく}} [[Category:仙台市の建築物|*いすみく]] [[Category:泉区 (仙台市)|けんちくふつ]] {{座標一覧}}

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
1 revision imported: more imports
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:仙台市泉区の建築物]] [[ko:Category:이즈미구 (센다이시)의 건축물]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA content, refresh translated-page template, tidy interwikis & categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:仙台市泉区の建築物]] to [[Category:Architecture in Izumi Ward, Sendai]]: Merge [[Category:仙台市泉区の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture in Izumi Ward, Sendai]] via bot
Merge [[Category:仙台市の区の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture by Ward in Sendai]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28108785)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28108785)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|宮城県の建築物|仙台市の建築物}}
* {{Pathnav|仙台市|仙台市の区|泉区 (仙台市)}}
}}
{{citation needed|いすみく}}
{{座標一覧}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:仙台市泉区の建築物|version=89157075}}
{{wikidata link|Q28108785}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:仙台市泉区の建築物]]
[[ko:Category:이즈미구 (센다이시)의 건축물]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Kamo Shrine (Sendai City)]]
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Futahashira Shrine]]
[[Category:Architecture by Ward in Sendai]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Izumi-ku, Sendai]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Jawiki pages with translated titles]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|宮城県の建築物|仙台市の建築物}}
* {{Pathnav|仙台市|仙台市の区|泉区 (仙台市)}}
}}
{{citation needed|いすみく}}
